allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from bwb.validation import compute_all_metrics, kge, rmse, crps_mean, ValidationConfig, SensitivityConfig; import numpy as np; sim=np.array\([1.0,2,3,4,5]\); obs=np.array\([1.1,2.2,2.8,4.1,4.9]\); fs=np.random.randn\(5,100\)+sim[:,None]; print\('KGE=', round\(kge\(sim,obs\),3\)\); print\('RMSE=', round\(rmse\(sim,obs\),3\)\); print\('CRPS=', round\(crps_mean\(fs,obs\),3\)\); print\('all=', {k: round\(v,3\) if isinstance\(v,float\) else v for k,v in compute_all_metrics\(sim,obs,fs\).items\(\)}\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'src'\); from bwb.validation import compute_all_metrics, kge, rmse, crps_mean, ValidationConfig, SensitivityConfig; import numpy as np; sim=np.array\([1.0,2,3,4,5]\); obs=np.array\([1.1,2.2,2.8,4.1,4.9]\); fs=np.random.randn\(5,100\)+sim[:,None]; print\('KGE=', round\(kge\(sim,obs\),3\)\); print\('RMSE=', round\(rmse\(sim,obs\),3\)\); print\('CRPS=', round\(crps_mean\(fs,obs\),3\)\); print\('all=', {k: round\(v,3\) if isinstance\(v,float\) else v for k,v in compute_all_metrics\(sim,obs,fs\).items\(\)}\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import bwb; from bwb.validation import compute_all_metrics, kge; print\('OK', bwb.__version__\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from bwb.config.settings import get_settings; from bwb.config.profiles import load_profile, list_profiles; s = get_settings\(\); print\('region=', s.region, 'draws=', s.draws, 'project_root=', s.project_root\); profile = load_profile\('matopiba'\); print\('Available profiles:', list_profiles\(\)\); print\('Crop AWC:', profile['crop']['awc_mm'], 'Cities:', list\(profile['cities'].keys\(\)\)[:3]\)")
Bash(python -c "from bwb.data.sources.climate import download_nasa_power; print\('OK import'\)")
